title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: dnsmasq bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for dnsmasq is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The dnsmasq packages contain Dnsmasq, a lightweight DNS (Domain Name Server) forwarder and DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol) server.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): enable A/AAAA filtering in dnsmasq  (JIRA:RHEL-105367)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64 - 4 years of updates

Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server for Power LE - Update Services for SAP Solutions

full_text:
An update for dnsmasq is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The dnsmasq packages contain Dnsmasq, a lightweight DNS (Domain Name Server) forwarder and DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol) server.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): enable A/AAAA filtering in dnsmasq  (JIRA:RHEL-105367)
